name: database-schema
description: Table and column reference with FK relationships and full Alembic migration history. Check before writing any migration, DB query, or schema-dependent feature.

name: deployment
description: Server lifecycle, systemd service management, address validation workflow, backfill commands, and full ops reference. Check before touching infra, services, or env config.

name: source-page
description: WSLCB source page HTML structure and field label quirks. Must consult when touching parser.py or any scraping/parsing logic.

name: style
description: Brand colors, CSS conventions, and Tailwind usage patterns. Check before modifying templates or adding new UI components.

name: infra
description: systemd unit and timer files for all services (web, scraper, address validation, healthcheck). Consult when modifying service configuration or adding new scheduled tasks.

name: architecture-review
description: Architectural review findings and design decisions. Useful context for structural changes or understanding historical design rationale.

name: research
description: Domain research: entity classification, template analysis, data audits, and record linking analysis. Relevant for work on entities, record linking, and data quality.
